info.name: Harmoniv Time API v1.0.5
info.description:
# Harmoniv Time API v1.0.5

Generated: 2026-05-27T15:06:54.994Z

## Summary
- **Total Endpoints:** 206
- **Gateways:** 5

## Authentication
Set `TOKEN` in the environment to a Bearer JWT obtained from `POST /api/auth/login`.

## Gateways
- **Admin**: 24 endpoints
- **Auth**: 6 endpoints
- **Customer**: 45 endpoints
- **Public**: 104 endpoints
- **Seller**: 27 endpoints

item.name: Admin/GST
item.description: Admin endpoints for managing seller GST records

request.description:
GET /admin/gst

🔐 Requires authentication (admin)

Returns all seller GST records with IsVerified status.

PUT /admin/gst/:id/verify

🔐 Requires authentication (admin)

Marks the GST record as verified.

item.name: Admin/Products
item.description: Admin product moderation — approve or reject listings before they go live to buyers

request.description:
GET /admin/products?status=Pending

🔐 Requires authentication (admin)

Returns enriched products filtered by ApprovalStatus. Use status=Pending to see the review queue.

PUT /admin/products/:productID/approve

🔐 Requires authentication (admin)

Sets ApprovalStatus to Approved — the product becomes visible to buyers immediately.

PUT /admin/products/:productID/reject

🔐 Requires authentication (admin)

Sets ApprovalStatus to Rejected. The note is shown to the seller so they know what to fix.

item.name: Admin/Sellers
item.description: Admin seller verification — view full profiles and approve, reject, or request missing information

query.description: Unverified | Pending | Approved | Rejected (omit for all sellers)

request.description:
GET /admin/sellers?status=Pending

🔐 Requires authentication (admin)

Lists all users who have at least one product listing. Filter by sellerVerificationStatus.

GET /admin/sellers/:sellerID

🔐 Requires authentication (admin)

Returns seller user info + GST details + bank accounts + product counts (total / approved / pending / rejected).

PUT /admin/sellers/:sellerID/approve

🔐 Requires authentication (admin)

Sets sellerVerificationStatus to Approved.

PUT /admin/sellers/:sellerID/reject

🔐 Requires authentication (admin)

Sets sellerVerificationStatus to Rejected. The note is shown to the seller.

PUT /admin/sellers/:sellerID/request-info

🔐 Requires authentication (admin)

Keeps status as Pending but saves a note telling the seller exactly what is missing.

item.name: GST
item.description: Seller GST details — CRUD for own GST registration

request.description:
POST /seller/gst

🔐 Requires authentication

📋 Request Body Fields:
• GSTIN: string (required) — 15-char GST number
• LegalBusinessName: string (required)
• TradeName: string (optional)
• BusinessType: string (optional) — Proprietorship | Partnership | Private Limited | LLP | Other
• RegisteredAddress: string (optional)
• State: string (optional)
• PinCode: string (optional)

body.raw:
{
  "GSTIN": "27AAPFU0939F1ZV",
  "LegalBusinessName": "Acme Watches Pvt Ltd",
  "TradeName": "Acme Watches",
  "BusinessType": "Private Limited",
  "RegisteredAddress": "123 MG Road",
  "State": "Maharashtra",
  "PinCode": "400001"
}

request.description:
PUT /seller/gst/:id

🔐 Requires authentication

Updates GST record; resets IsVerified to false.
